definition:
Κρύπτω 
 [in LXX for חָבָא, טָמַן, סָתַר, צָפַן, etc. ;] 
to hide, conceal: with accusative, Mat.13:44 25:18; before ἐν, Mat.25:25 (pass., Mat.13:44, Col.3:3); pass., Mat.5:14, Heb.11:23, 1Ti.5:25, Rev.2:17; ἐκρύβη (on the tense and its formation, see M, Pr., 161; Bl., § 19, 3) κ. ἐξῆλθεν Jhn.8:59; before εἰς, Luk.13:21, Rev.6:15; ἀπό (in cl. more frequently dupl. accusative), Rev.6:16; pass., Jhn.12:36, (Bl., § 34, 4). Metaphorical: Mat.11:25 13:35, Luk.11:52, WH, mg., Luk.18:34 19:42, Jhn.19:38 (cf.ἀτο-, ἐν-, περι-κρύπτω).†
 (AS)
